programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Melodic rom-com with Natasha Henstridge. It's a battle of the beats when music teachers from competing schools enter a choir contest. As sparks fly, will they follow the rhythm of their heart? (2012)
Abby is a famous author whose latest stop on her book tour takes her to the town of Bliss. But little does she know that the locals are keen to play matchmaker for her. Lauren Holly stars. (2014)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Amber's life is less than ideal. Recently split from the 'perfect boyfriend', she's floundering. When Amber starts re-living the same day over and over again, she realises she's stuck in limbo. (2019)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

City lawyer Claire returns home to save her a family's pumpkin farm over a property dispute. The opposing lawyer is Patrick, her high school debate class nemesis. (2019)
